title: MetaMask launches stablecoin yield account with card spending
summary: MetaMask launches stablecoin yield account with card spending
briefing: MetaMask launches Money Account it says offers up to 4% variable APY on mUSD stablecoin balances and card spending, with DeFi-powered yield via vaults, excluding the UK and EU.

title: OKX launches AI marketplace for autonomous agent economy
summary: OKX launches AI marketplace for autonomous agent economy
briefing: OKX launched a beta marketplace for the agentic economy, enabling AI agents to autonomously find work and collaborate with other agents.

title: Strategy's new plan divides industry observers even as MSTR, STRC climb
summary: Strategy's new plan divides industry observers even as MSTR, STRC climb
briefing: Strategy’s new Bitcoin capital framework draws Wall Street backing from Benchmark with a $570 per share target even as traders question long-term demand risk.

title: Theo becomes first crypto-native investor in Fidelity tokenized fund
summary: Theo becomes first crypto-native investor in Fidelity tokenized fund
briefing: The onchain capital markets platform allocated $20 million to Fidelity International's tokenized liquidity fund as tokenized Treasury products continue to attract institutional capital.

title: Swan's Cory Klippsten sees record Bitcoin holder supply revealing early bottom
summary: Swan's Cory Klippsten sees record Bitcoin holder supply revealing early bottom
briefing: The record Bitcoin supply held by long-term holders may suggest that the crypto market bottom will come early, according to Swan’s Cory Klippsten.

title: StarkWare unveils Starknet quantum roadmap, says industry has no excuse
summary: StarkWare unveils Starknet quantum roadmap, says industry has no excuse
briefing: “The crypto industry shouldn’t need wake-up calls from the White House or anyone else,” said StarkWare CEO Eli Ben-Sasson.

title: Spiko links EU regulated T-bill funds to Coinbase stablecoin rails
summary: Spiko links EU regulated T-bill funds to Coinbase stablecoin rails
briefing: Spiko integrated Coinbase Payments into two EU regulated UCITS Treasury funds, enabling USDC and EURC subscriptions and redemption payments through Base.

title: Solana Company to back Kazakhstan’s $6B crypto megacity ambition
summary: Solana Company to back Kazakhstan’s $6B crypto megacity ambition
briefing: Nasdaq-listed Solana Company has signed a memorandum of understanding with Kazakhstan's Alatau City, which seeks to become a key crypto hub in Central Asia.

title: TD Cowen Slashes Strategy Price Target, Citing Ongoing Bitcoin Weakness
summary: TD Cowen Slashes Strategy Price Target, Citing Ongoing Bitcoin Weakness
briefing: Strategy's stock price started sliding again on Tuesday, one day after breaking a nine-day losing streak.

title: Crypto Wallet MetaMask Launches Yield-Paying Money Account on Monad
summary: Crypto Wallet MetaMask Launches Yield-Paying Money Account on Monad
briefing: MetaMask is packaging stablecoin yield, payments, and trading into a single self-custody account as crypto firms compete to make digital dollars more useful.

title: Morning Minute: A Change of Strategy
summary: Morning Minute: A Change of Strategy
briefing: Michael Saylor's Strategy is rolling out some major changes to how it handles Bitcoin going forward. And so far, the market likes it.

title: FCA Finalizes Landmark Crypto Rules to Make UK a 'Global Hub'
summary: FCA Finalizes Landmark Crypto Rules to Make UK a 'Global Hub'
briefing: The UK regulator has published its final rulebook for crypto firms ahead of a mandatory regime coming into force in late 2027.

title: '47 Ronin' Director Gets 30 Months for Spending Netflix's $11M on Dogecoin
summary: '47 Ronin' Director Gets 30 Months for Spending Netflix's $11M on Dogecoin
briefing: Carl Rinsch gambled Netflix's $11 million on stock options and Dogecoin, then spent the winnings on luxury cars and watches.

title: Ornith Is the Open-Source Coding Model Built for Agents, Not Humans
summary: Ornith Is the Open-Source Coding Model Built for Agents, Not Humans
briefing: A new model built by DeepReinforce is meant for developers who want AI that finishes the job, not just autocompletes the next line.

title: Strategy Snaps 9-Day Losing Streak as Bitcoin Giant Adopts 'Robust' Capital Framework
summary: Strategy Snaps 9-Day Losing Streak as Bitcoin Giant Adopts 'Robust' Capital Framework
briefing: Strategy's shares remained 42% down from its market-rattling Bitcoin sale nearly a month ago.

title: China Has Its Own Mythos Now, Says Qihoo 360 Founder. And One Version Is Free
summary: China Has Its Own Mythos Now, Says Qihoo 360 Founder. And One Version Is Free
briefing: Qihoo 360 unveiled a homegrown vulnerability-hunting AI this week—and Z.ai went further, releasing comparable capabilities as open-weight code anyone can download.
